channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Enfortumab vedotin plus pembrolizumab outperforms platinum-based chemotherapy in metastatic urothelial carcinoma
item.description: 1. For adults with metastatic urothelial carcinoma, the combination of enfortumab vedotin and pembrolizumab was well-tolerated and...

item.title: Affordable Care Act insurers seek larger premium increases as enrollment declines
item.description: For the second consecutive year, many ACA insurers are proposing double-digit premium hikes, fueled by rising medical costs and a...

item.title: Donated breast milk reduces life-threatening gut disease in premature babies by over a third
item.description: The incidence of necrotizing enterocolitis, a severe gut condition, dropped by 38% in very premature infants who received donated b...

item.title: Food insecurity associated with telehealth abortion choices
item.description: People seeking abortions face major obstacles, including high costs, travel logistics, childcare needs, and fear of...
